headline: Palantir co-founder Peter Thiel honoured with Axel Springer Award
summary: Peter Thiel is to receive the 2026 Axel Springer Award for shaping digital transformation.

headline: GameStop (GME) Following Uber Eats Deal Has The Bull Case Already Priced In
summary: GameStop (GME) is back in focus after the company announced a nationwide partnership with Uber Technologies, which puts its games, consoles, and collectibles onto the Uber Eats on demand retail platform. See our latest analysis for GameStop. Despite high profile moves such as the Uber Eats partnership and the pursuit of eBay, GameStop’s 30 day share price return of 2.14% and 90 day share price decline of 10.71% sit alongside a 1 year total shareholder return that is down 5.22%. Together,...

headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks on Our Buy List and 1 We Turn Down
summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.

raw.headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks on Our Buy List and 1 We Turn Down
raw.summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.

headline: GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen Won't Give Up on eBay Pursuit, Says 'We're Coming for eBay One Way or Another'
summary: GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen is pressing ahead with his bid for eBay despite its rejection of the company's $56 billion offer in May.

raw.headline: GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen Won't Give Up on eBay Pursuit, Says 'We're Coming for eBay One Way or Another'
raw.summary: GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen is pressing ahead with his bid for eBay despite its rejection of the company's $56 billion offer in May.
